title: Agent enrichment missing from Effect server — INPUT badge, Watch Planning, resolution badges broken
approach: Background poller + domain events: new AgentEnrichmentService polls JSONL + runtime.json every 3s, diffs against last known state, emits agent.enrichment_changed events. Shared reducer merges enrichment into AgentSnapshot. Bootstrap computes enrichment inline.

items.title: Extend AgentSnapshot schema and add enrichment event to contracts
items.description: Add 'planning' to AgentPhase enum. Add agentPhase, hasPendingQuestion, pendingQuestionCount, resolution, resolutionCount fields to AgentSnapshot. Create AgentEnrichmentChangedEvent schema and add to DomainEvent union. Add reducer case to applyEvent().
acceptance: AgentPhase includes 'planning'
AgentSnapshot has all 5 enrichment fields as optional
AgentEnrichmentChangedEvent is in the DomainEvent union
applyEvent reducer merges enrichment fields into agentsById entry
contracts package builds without errors

items.title: Extract JSONL scanning and enrichment logic to shared utility
items.description: Move getPendingQuestions() and getAgentJsonlPath() from src/dashboard/server/routes/agents.ts to src/lib/agent-enrichment.ts. Add computeAgentEnrichment() that combines JSONL scan + runtime.json read + phase inference into a single enrichment object. Update the old REST endpoint to import from the new location.
acceptance: getPendingQuestions() works from new location
computeAgentEnrichment(agentId) returns { agentPhase, hasPendingQuestion, pendingQuestionCount, resolution, resolutionCount }
Old REST /api/agents endpoint still works (imports from new location)
Phase inference: planning- prefix → 'planning', else state.phase or 'implementation'

items.title: Create AgentEnrichmentService background poller
items.description: New service at src/dashboard/server/services/agent-enrichment-service.ts. Polls every 3s, calls computeAgentEnrichment() for each running agent, diffs against cached enrichment, emits agent.enrichment_changed events via eventStore.append(). Tracks JSONL file mtime to skip unchanged files. Respects specialist suppression for hasPendingQuestion.
acceptance: Polls every ~3 seconds using setInterval (not execSync-based)
Only emits events when enrichment fields actually change (diff check)
Skips JSONL scan when file mtime unchanged
Suppresses hasPendingQuestion when agent has active specialist
Exports start()/stop() lifecycle functions
Handles agent appearing/disappearing between polls gracefully

items.title: Wire enrichment into read model bootstrap and server startup
items.description: During ReadModelServiceLive bootstrap, compute enrichment for each agent and merge into the initial agentsById entries. Start the AgentEnrichmentService after bootstrap. Ensure enrichment service is stopped on server shutdown.
acceptance: Initial snapshot includes enrichment fields for all running agents
No 3s gap where badges are missing after page load
Enrichment service starts after bootstrap completes
Service is properly cleaned up on shutdown

items.title: Verify frontend badges and buttons render correctly
items.description: Build the full stack, start the dashboard, and verify: INPUT badge appears when an agent has pending questions, Done/Stuck/Blocked badges render based on resolution, Watch Planning button appears for planning agents, planning input toast fires in App.tsx. No frontend code changes should be needed.
acceptance: INPUT badge visible on kanban card when agent has pending question
Done badge shows when resolution === 'done'
Stuck badge shows when resolution === 'stuck'
Blocked badge shows when resolution === 'needs_input'
Watch Planning button appears when planning agent is active
Planning input toast fires in App.tsx
GodView phase badge shows correct phase color
